eventsFunctionsExtensions.name: PanelSpriteSlider
eventsFunctionsExtensions.shortDescription: A draggable slider that users can move to select a numerical value.
description: A draggable slider that users can move to select a numerical value. The slider can be customized with sprites.
There are ready-to-use sliders in the asset-store [settings UI pack](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?initial-dialog=asset-store&asset-pack=settings-ui-settings-ui).

changelog.breaking: - Sliders now use "variants", allowing easy swapping of their visual aspect. You will have to make some adjustments to existing sliders in your project. Follow this [migration documentation](https://wiki.gdevelop.io/gdevelop5/objects/custom-objects-prefab-template/migrate-to-variants/) to do these changes.

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the events are running for the editor.
eventsFunctions.name: IsInGameEdition
eventsFunctions.sentence: Events are running for the editor

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Represent a value on a slider.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: Slider

eventsFunctions.description: the value of the object.
eventsFunctions.name: Value

eventsFunctions.description: the minimum value of the object.
eventsFunctions.name: MinValue

eventsFunctions.description: the maximum value of the object.
eventsFunctions.name: MaxValue

eventsFunctions.description: the bar value bounds size.
eventsFunctions.name: Size

eventsFunctions.description: the step size of the object.
eventsFunctions.name: StepSize

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: The finite state machine used internally by the button object.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: ButtonFSM

events.comment: The "Validated" state only last one frame.
Make sure the cursor position is only checked once per frame.
Touches are always pressed, so ShouldCheckHovering doesn't matter.

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is not used.
eventsFunctions.name: IsIdle

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button was just clicked.
eventsFunctions.name: IsClicked

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the cursor is hovered over the button.
eventsFunctions.name: IsHovered

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is either hovered or pressed but not hovered.
eventsFunctions.name: IsFocused

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is currently being pressed with mouse or touch.
eventsFunctions.name: IsPressed

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is currently being pressed outside with mouse or touch.
eventsFunctions.name: IsPressedOutside

eventsFunctions.description: the touch id that is using the button or 0 if none.
eventsFunctions.name: TouchId

eventsBasedObjects.description: Let users select a numerical value by dragging a slider.
eventsBasedObjects.name: PanelSpriteSlider

events.comment: Anchors won't work as there is an absolute margin and a proportional size at the same time
This allows to detect a change of "intial value" on hot reload.
Hide the Label that is displayed over the thumb.
Pass the configuration to the behavior.

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the slider is being dragged.
eventsFunctions.name: IsBeingDragged

eventsFunctions.description: the value of the slider.
eventsFunctions.name: Value

eventsFunctions.description: the minimum value of the slider.
eventsFunctions.name: MinValue

eventsFunctions.description: the maximum value of the slider.
eventsFunctions.name: MaxValue

eventsFunctions.description: the step size of the slider.
eventsFunctions.name: StepSize

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the label is shown.
eventsFunctions.name: IsLabelShown

eventsFunctions.description: Show (or hide) the label on the bar.
eventsFunctions.name: SetLabelShown

eventsFunctions.description: Update the thumb position according to the slider value.
eventsFunctions.name: UpdateThumbPosition

eventsFunctions.description: Update the slider configuration.
eventsFunctions.name: UpdateSliderConfiguration

events.comment: Pass configuration to the behavior and update children.

eventsFunctions.description: De/activate interactions with the button.
eventsFunctions.name: Activate

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the slider allows interactions.
eventsFunctions.name: IsActivated

propertyDescriptors.description: It's used to detect a change at hot reload.
